title: otostegia fruticosa subsp. fruticosa
intro: Otostegia fruticosa subsp. fruticosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the 'Desert Lavender'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Otostegia fruticosa subsp. fruticosa include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
